'''Scurrier tips''' were a very seasonable [[Foodstuff/Legends|dish]] produced by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and known in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] as '''''scuzzi spits'''''. The dish was considered a delicacy by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] scholar [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]], who advised any Humans visiting the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to try it in the Hutt [[Restaurant/Legends|eateries]] found there. The advice was part of his recommendation of the dish as one of his favorites in his [[Book/Legends|book]], ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]'', which was authored in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. The dish was mentioned in the Huttese section of the guide, which also explained that Huttese dishes were usually eaten casually in a random order. Baobab also claimed that Hutt cuisine was expensive, and that utensils were optional when eating it, although [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] were recommended.<ref name="GPBATG" /> It shared its name with the creature known as the [[Scurrier/Legends|scurrier]], which lived on Tatooine.<ref name="Wild">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Scurrier tips were first mentioned in the [[2001]] book, [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], which was written by [[Ben Burtt]].<ref name="GPBATG" />
